risks.title: Unreviewed security component changes
risks.evidence: Security.tsx modified with high relevance scores (0.85-0.95) indicating substantial changes to security-related frontend code
risks.recommendedAction: Immediately review the actual changes in Security.tsx for potential vulnerabilities, authentication bypasses, or permission escalation issues

risks.title: Event deduplication failures in monitoring system
risks.evidence: Four events logged for same file with near-identical timestamps (19:02:22.476-477Z and 19:02:39.029-030Z), creating noise and obfuscating signal
risks.recommendedAction: Investigate code-observer deduplication logic to prevent duplicate events from obscuring critical changes

opportunities.suggestedAction: Conduct security code review and add automated security scanning for Security.tsx in CI/CD pipeline

opportunities.title: Improve monitoring system reliability
opportunities.evidence: Duplicate events indicate opportunity to enhance event deduplication logic
opportunities.suggestedAction: Refactor code-observer event aggregation to use content-based deduplication with configurable thresholds

taskCandidates.title: Debug event deduplication in code-observer

recommendations.title: Implement content-aware event deduplication
recommendations.rationale: Current timestamp-based deduplication is insufficient; multiple events for same file indicate need for smarter aggregation
recommendations.action: Update code-observer to deduplicate events for same file path within configurable time windows (e.g., 1 second)

recommendations.title: Add mandatory security review workflow for Security.tsx
recommendations.rationale: Security component changes should never bypass review given sensitivity and potential blast radius
recommendations.action: Configure pre-commit hooks and CI/CD to require security team approval before Security.tsx changes are committed

recommendations.title: Investigate root cause of recent Security.tsx activity
recommendations.rationale: Four events in 17 seconds suggests either rapid development or system instability
recommendations.action: Review git history of Security.tsx to understand whether these are intentional rapid iterations or automated tooling changes
